title: Hand-curate the order

publish.description: Use the Manual order tab to hand-curate product order, guided by per-product metrics.

intro: Sometimes you want the final say on order — a hero product up top, a seasonal push, a merchandising call an algorithm can't make. The Manual order tab lets you arrange products by hand while still showing the metrics behind each one.

steps.heading: Open the Manual order tab
steps.body: Left menu → **Collections** → open a collection → the **Manual order** tab. It lists every product in the collection as a table, in the order shoppers currently see.

els.text: Left menu → Collections → open a collection → the Manual order tab to arrange products by hand.

steps.heading: Arrange products by hand
steps.body: Reorder the rows to set the exact sequence you want. This is where you override the algorithm — pin a launch product to the top, or group a promotion together, regardless of what the sales signals suggest.

els.text: Reorder rows to set the exact sequence — your merchandising call overrides the signals.

steps.heading: Let the metrics guide you
steps.body: Each row shows per-product metrics — sales, CTR, and inventory — right beside the product. Use them as a guide while you curate, so your hand-set order still respects what's actually performing.

els.text: Per-product metrics sit beside each row so your manual order still reflects real performance.

notes.text: Switch the sort rule to Manual pinning if you want this hand-set order to stick instead of being re-sorted automatically.

outro: Manual order gives you full control: arrange products exactly as you want them, with per-product metrics on hand to keep your curation grounded in real data.
